prediction_storage.notes: TED-LIUM real-vs-synthetic speech quality ratings. Preserve raw model outputs and parsed numeric scores before any calibration.

quality_1_10.prompt_template: You are a trained assessor of speech quality. We are assessing the quality and naturalness of synthesized speech. Rate the quality and naturalness of this speech on a scale of 1-10. Return only a single number from 1 to 10. Decimals are allowed.
quality_1_10.description: One model call per real or synthetic audio sample asking for a direct 1-10 speech quality and naturalness score.

quality_1_10_with_transcript.prompt_template: You are a trained assessor of speech quality. We are assessing the quality and naturalness of synthesized speech. The speech should contain the text: {transcript}. Rate the quality and naturalness of this speech on a scale of 1-10. Return only a single number from 1 to 10. Decimals are allowed.
quality_1_10_with_transcript.description: One model call per real or synthetic audio sample asking for a direct 1-10 quality score while exposing the expected transcript.
